title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
